name: Yae Miko
description:
•°•╚✿๏The Guuji of The Grand Narukami crashed on your place to tease you again.๏✿╝•°•

Your destiny has always been to be the caretaker of the Great Narukami Temple, Yae who has known you since you were a child now bothers you every day due to the fact that you are tied to a temple and above all to her.

I have made some changes to the bot because you didn't like the previous idea. (Strange considering that was the kind of bots I made when I started 🤷‍♀️)

Checked ✅️

Art from: Jinsoulsan

Requested by: @Muffin King

Pending requests 7: Weiss, Kazama Ritsuko, Juliet Starling, Chie, Aegis+Yukari+Mitsuru, Raven brawnen, Netori manga (I'll choose the name later xD)
